name: AI Agent – Tool-Calling with Persistent Memory

nodes.name: Webhook – Agent Chat
nodes.notes: Entry point. Expects { session_id, message, user_id } in the body.

nodes.name: Redis – Load Conversation Memory
nodes.notes: Loads the last N turns of conversation history from Redis using session_id as key.

nodes.name: Code – Build Message History
nodes.notes: Parses memory from Redis, trims to last 10 turns, and builds the full messages array including system prompt.

nodes.name: HTTP – GPT-4o Agent Call
nodes.notes: GPT-4o with 4 tools: web_search, get_weather, calculate, query_database. Returns tool_call or direct answer.

nodes.name: Code – Route: Tool Call or Answer?
nodes.notes: Routes workflow based on finish_reason: 'tool_calls' -> execute tools, 'stop' -> return final answer.

nodes.name: Code – Tool Dispatcher
nodes.notes: Executes the requested tool. calculate is live; web_search, weather, db are stubbed with clear integration notes.

nodes.name: HTTP – GPT-4o Resume with Tool Results
nodes.notes: Sends tool results back to GPT-4o so it can synthesize the final answer using real data.

nodes.name: Code – Collect Final Answer
nodes.notes: Merges both code paths (tool vs direct) and assembles updated history for persistence.

nodes.name: Redis – Save Updated Memory
nodes.notes: Persists updated conversation history to Redis with 24h TTL. Enables multi-turn conversations.

main.node: Code – Route: Tool Call or Answer?
HTTP – GPT-4o Resume with Tool Results
